controls.tryIt: [XX-Try it -- the tour continues once you do-XX]
controls.skippedBody: [XX-Some steps were skipped because their screen or control wasn't available. You can retake the tour anytime from Settings.-XX]

offer.heading: [XX-Take a quick tour-XX]
offer.subheading: [XX-Short walkthroughs of what's new in this release.-XX]

settings.title: [XX-Guided tours-XX]
settings.description: [XX-Walk through the app's features step by step.-XX]
settings.resetError: [XX-Couldn't reset tour progress. Please try again.-XX]

welcome.title: [XX-Welcome to Monize-XX]
welcome.body: [XX-This quick tour shows you around the core of the app. You can leave anytime by pressing Escape or End tour.-XX]

dashboard.title: [XX-Your dashboard-XX]
dashboard.body: [XX-Widgets here summarize your balances, spending, and upcoming bills at a glance. You can rearrange them later in Settings.-XX]

navigation.title: [XX-Getting around-XX]
navigation.body: [XX-Use the navigation to jump between your accounts, transactions, budgets, and reports.-XX]

accounts.title: [XX-Add an account-XX]
accounts.body: [XX-Start by adding your bank, credit card, loan, or investment accounts. Balances and transactions live under each account.-XX]

createTransaction.title: [XX-Record a transaction-XX]
createTransaction.body: [XX-Click New Transaction to add income or spending. Go ahead and open the form.-XX]

currencyField.title: [XX-Foreign currencies-XX]
currencyField.body: [XX-Set a different currency here to record a transaction made abroad -- Monize converts it for you.-XX]

closeForm.title: [XX-Close the form to continue-XX]
closeForm.body: [XX-Close the transaction form (Cancel or the X) and the tour will move on.-XX]

budgets.title: [XX-Plan with budgets-XX]
budgets.body: [XX-Budgets let you set monthly targets per category and track how you're tracking against them.-XX]

reports.title: [XX-Understand your money-XX]
reports.body: [XX-Reports turn your transactions into charts -- spending by category, net worth over time, and more.-XX]

finish.title: [XX-You're all set-XX]
finish.body: [XX-That's the tour. Adjust preferences here in Settings, and retake this tour anytime from the Guided tours section.-XX]

openAccount.title: [XX-Open an account-XX]
openAccount.body: [XX-Open an account that has foreign-currency transactions to see its currency-fee breakdown.-XX]

fxFees.title: [XX-Foreign-currency fees-XX]
fxFees.body: [XX-This section breaks down the fees you paid on foreign-currency activity, separate from the transaction register.-XX]

outro.title: [XX-Foreign-currency fees-XX]
outro.body: [XX-Accounts with foreign-currency activity now show a dedicated fee breakdown on their detail page.-XX]

whatsNewToggle.title: [XX-Release highlights-XX]
whatsNewToggle.body: [XX-This toggle controls whether the What's New summary pops up automatically after an update.-XX]

appVersion.title: [XX-Reread the notes-XX]
appVersion.body: [XX-Click the version label at the bottom of Settings anytime to reopen the release notes.-XX]

done.title: [XX-That's it-XX]
done.body: [XX-You can revisit these highlights whenever you like from here in Settings.-XX]
